title: The Four Gospels: the life of Christ and His teachings.

questionsList.questionContent: In which town was Jesus born according to Matthew and Luke?
Who was the Roman governor that presided over the trial of Jesus?
Which of the four Gospels is known for its focus on the 'I Am' statements of Jesus?
How many baskets of fragments were collected after Jesus fed the five thousand?
Who was the first person to see the risen Jesus according to the Gospel of John?
What was the occupation of the disciples Peter and Andrew before they followed Jesus?
In which river was Jesus baptized by John the Baptist?
Which disciple is famously known as 'the doubter' regarding the resurrection?
What was the name of the tax collector who climbed a sycamore tree to see Jesus?
How many days did Jesus fast in the wilderness before being tempted?
In the Parable of the Sower, what does the seed represent?
Which Gospel begins with the genealogy of Jesus starting from Abraham?
What was the name of the garden where Jesus prayed before His arrest?
Who was the High Priest that presided over the Jewish trial of Jesus?
In the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus said the 'meek' shall inherit what?
Which miracle is recorded in all four Gospels?
What was the name of the man Jesus raised from the dead in Bethany?
According to the Gospel of Mark, who was released instead of Jesus?
Which city did Jesus enter on a donkey while the crowds shouted 'Hosanna'?
What was the name of the man who helped Jesus carry the cross?
At the Transfiguration, which two Old Testament figures appeared with Jesus?
Where was Jesus when he performed his first recorded miracle in the Gospel of John?
To which town were the two disciples walking when the risen Jesus joined them?
How many times did Peter deny Jesus before the rooster crowed?
Who was the mother of John the Baptist?
What did Judas Iscariot receive in exchange for betraying Jesus?
Which disciple was a former tax collector?
What was the name of the place where Jesus was crucified?
In which Gospel do we find the 'Magnificat' (Mary's Song)?
What was the name of the Roman centurion's servant who was healed?

What gift did the Wise Men bring besides Gold and Frankincense?

What was the primary language Jesus likely spoke?
Who provided the tomb where Jesus was buried?
Which miracle involves Jesus walking on the Sea of Galilee?
How many chapters are in the Gospel of Matthew?
In the Parable of the Prodigal Son, what animal did the father kill for the feast?
What was the name of the High Priest's servant whose ear was cut off?
Which Gospel emphasizes Jesus as the 'Word' (Logos)?
What did Jesus say is the 'greatest commandment'?
What did Jesus use to heal a man born blind in the Gospel of John?
Who was the father of James and John, the 'Sons of Thunder'?
How many beatitudes are listed in the Sermon on the Mount (Matthew 5)?

How many loaves of bread were used to feed the four thousand?

In which city did Jesus grow up?
What did Jesus say his followers are to the world?
Who was the father of John the Baptist?
Which Gospel contains the Parable of the Good Samaritan?
What was the first temptation of Jesus in the wilderness?

How many people did Jesus feed with five loaves and two fish?
What did the voice from heaven say at Jesus' baptism?
To whom did Jesus say, 'You must be born again'?
Which miracle involves the daughter of Jairus?
Who was the Roman Emperor during Jesus' adult ministry?
Where did Jesus meet the woman at the well?
Which of Jesus' disciples was also called Nathanael?
In the Parable of the Ten Virgins, what did the foolish virgins lack?

How many chapters are in the Gospel of Mark?
What did the people of Nazareth try to do to Jesus when he preached in their synagogue?
Who was the 'voice of one crying in the wilderness'?
Which city was the home of Mary, Martha, and Lazarus?
In the Gospel of John, what was Jesus' first sign?
How many days was Lazarus in the tomb before Jesus arrived?

Which title did Jesus use most frequently for himself?
What did Jesus say would be the stones if His disciples were quiet during the entry to Jerusalem?

What was the name of the blind man Jesus healed near Jericho?

Who was the High Priest who sent Jesus to Pilate?
What was the name of the pool where Jesus healed a man who had been an invalid for 38 years?
What did Jesus say is the 'bread of life'?
In Luke, who was the Roman official who ordered the census leading to Jesus' birth?
To which country did Joseph and Mary flee to protect the infant Jesus?
How many people were resurrected by Jesus in the Four Gospels?
Which disciple was also called 'Didymus'?

To whom did Jesus say 'Get behind me, Satan'?
Which disciple was a 'tax collector'?

How many tribes of Israel were mentioned in relation to the disciples?
Who was the mother of Jesus?
What was the name of the man who took Jesus' body from the cross?

What did Jesus say is the 'lamp of the body'?

Which Gospel was written by a physician?
Which group was known for their strict adherence to the oral law?

Who was the High Priest who questioned Jesus before Caiaphas?
What did Jesus say he would give to the woman at the well?
Where was the pool of Siloam located?
What was the name of the man who asked to bury Jesus?

Which disciple was also known as 'Jude' (not Iscariot)?

What was the first word of the Sermon on the Mount?

Who did Jesus call 'the father of lies'?

How many water jars did Jesus use at the wedding in Cana?

What did Jesus say we should do for our enemies?
Who asked Jesus, 'What is truth?'
Where was Jesus when he was arrested?
Who was the king who wanted to see Jesus perform a miracle during his trial?
Which Gospel mentions the 'star' that the Wise Men followed?
In the Parable of the Good Samaritan, who was the first person to pass by the wounded man?
Which disciple was a 'Zealot'?
How many fish were caught in the miraculous catch in John 21?
Who was the father of Herod the Great?
What was the name of the place where Jesus was when he was transfigured?
What was the name of the man who led Jesus to the top of the Temple during temptation?
Which disciple was called the 'son of perdition'?
How many days did Jesus remain in the grave?
What was the name of the mother of the sons of Zebedee?
Which Gospel contains the 'Beattitudes'?
What did the soldiers do with Jesus' seamless garment?
Who was the High Priest that said 'it is better for one man to die'?
Where did Jesus tell the blind man to wash his eyes in John 9?
How many people were fed in the second miraculous feeding?
Which Gospel includes the visit of the shepherds?
What was the name of the man who was released in exchange for Jesus?
How many times did Jesus tell us to forgive our brother?
Which Gospel was written to a man named Theophilus?

What did Jesus say to the storm on the Sea of Galilee?
Which disciple was known as the 'beloved disciple'?

How many times was Jesus tempted by the devil in the wilderness?

What did Jesus say would not pass away until all is fulfilled?
